slices.title: Dual-path orchestration collapse
slices.rollbackNote: Single commit on refactor/render-single-path; `git revert` restores dual-path orchestration. Depends on Slice 2; roll back Slice 2 only if the ASCII Canvas2D path is also restored.

deferredPasses: pnpm vitest run src/render/image/renderSingleImage.test.ts src/render/image/effectExecution.test.ts src/render/image/asciiEffect.test.ts src/render/image/carrierExecution.test.ts src/render/image/stageMaskComposite.test.ts src/render/image/effectMask.test.ts
deferredReason: Node 18 sandbox cannot run vitest@4 + rolldown; rerun in Node >= 20 before merging.
